---
title: "Structural changes due to a mutation in Cereblon might be a cause for intellectual disability" 
description: |
  This poster presentation was part of the [Global Intern Program 2019](https://ipa.gist.ac.kr/ipa/html/sub03/030101.html) at Gwangju Institute of Science and Technology.
date: "2019-08-14"
image: GIP_logo.png
categories: 
  - 🗺️Poster presentation 
  - 🔬Biomedicine
  - ⚛️Molecular dynamics
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify uil presentation >}} Poster (English)][poster]{.btn target=_blank}

You can find more details about this project [here][crbn_mutations]. 

[crbn_mutations]: ../../projects/CRBN_mutations/
[event]: https://ipa.gist.ac.kr/ipa/html/sub03/030101.html
[poster]: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/354366092_Structural_changes_due_to_a_mutation_in_Cereblon_might_be_a_cause_for_intellectual_disability
